返回本批次

足够了 Chimera Linux

Just Enough Chimera Linux

www.dwarmstrong.org 作者 speckx 分数 51 评论 14 2026/04/14 03:37
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 最后编辑于 2026-04-03 • 标记为 #chimera #linux #zfs #encrypt #zfsbootmenu
  2. Chimera Linux 是一个令人愉快的社区驱动的 Linux 发行版，从头开始构建，它的做法有所不同：C 库使用 musl 代替典型的 glibc，系统 init 使用 dinit 代替 systemd，以及源自 FreeBSD 核心工具的用户区。使用 Chimera 基本安装映像，并通过这个出色的安装指南来使用 OpenZFS 文件系统和 ZFSBootMenu 引导加载程序配置 Chimera，我展示了我为创建一个加密的、最小的 Linux 系统而做出的选择，“刚好足够”为进一步构建提供坚实的基础：无论是设置台式机、笔记本电脑还是服务器。
  3. 1. 从这里开始
  4. 获取安装镜像 准备USB安装介质
  5. 2. 配置直播环境

Original Summary

  1. Last edited on 2026-04-03 • Tagged under #chimera #linux #zfs #encrypt #zfsbootmenu
  2. Chimera Linux is a delightful community-driven Linux distribution built from scratch that does things differently: musl instead of the typical glibc for C library, dinit over systemd for system init, and a userland derived from FreeBSD core tools. Using the Chimera base install image and working my way through this excellent installation guide for configuring Chimera with the OpenZFS filesystem and the ZFSBootMenu bootloader, I show the choices I make to create an encrypted, minimal Linux system with “just enough” to provide a solid foundation to build upon further: whether that be setting up a desktop, laptop, or server.
  3. 1. Start Here
  4. Acquire an installation image Prepare the USB installation medium
  5. 2. Configure the Live Environment

评论（默认中文）

lrvick 2026/04/14 04:52
对于那些喜欢 chimera 的 LLVM/musl/mimalloc 选择，但也想要签名提交、签名评论、容器原生设计、完整源引导、100% 确定性构建和多方签名工件的人，请查看 https://stagex.tools
For those that like the LLVM/musl/mimalloc choices of chimera, but also want signed commits, signed reviews, container-native design, full source bootstrapping, 100% deterministic builds, and multi-party-signed artifacts check out https://stagex.tools

fuhsnn 2026/04/14 08:14
不过，不要把mimalloc 和mallocng 搞混了，它们是完全不同的动物。
Don't get mimalloc and mallocng mixed up though, completely different animals.
在 HN 中查看
lrvick 2026/04/14 10:49
100%，它确实是mimalloc，尽管如果需要的话您也可以使用glibc 或mallocng。
100%, and it is indeed mimalloc, though you can also use glibc or mallocng if needed.

Really love that project. Is there any planned support for NVIDIA drivers and runtime?

lrvick 2026/04/14 07:00

If anyone sponsors buying me modern Nvidia cards with open kernel support, I would gladly test and support them.

r0l1 2026/04/14 13:56
我有一块 RTX 2080 可以赠送。感兴趣的？
I have a RTX 2080 to give away. Interested?
在 HN 中查看
fennec-posix 2026/04/14 08:13
现在这是 为什么 我喜欢 UNIX 和类 UNIX，事实上你可以修改和更改内核、用户空间、Init 等核心组件，并且（在兼容性限制内，即 MUSL/GLIBC）运行像 Chimera 这样的混合系统。

我会将 Chimera 作为日常驾驶吗？可能不会。有人能做到很酷吗？绝对地！

Now this is WHY I love UNIX and UNIX-likes, the fact you can chop and change core components like the Kernel, Userspace, Init, etc. and (within compatibility limits i.e. MUSL/GLIBC) run a hybrid system like Chimera.

Would I run Chimera as a daily-drive? Probably not. Is it cool that someone can? Absolutely!

在 HN 中查看
userbinator 2026/04/14 12:22
当我几年前上次查看时，远东地区在“嵌合 Windows”方面做出了一些努力并取得了成功，主要基于在较新的内核 (10) 上运行较旧的用户空间（如 XP）。
When I last looked a few years ago, there were some efforts and successes in the far East doing "chimera Windows", mostly based on running an older userland (like XP) on a newer kernel (10).
在 HN 中查看
JCattheATM 2026/04/14 08:10
这看起来很有趣，但我多年来一直使用 Alpine 作为 ZFS 的桌面发行版，它具有本机支持，并且 ZBM 可在社区存储库中使用。不确定 Chimera 会增加什么优势。
This seems interesting, but I've been using Alpine as a desktop distro wth ZFS for years now, it has native support and ZBM is available in the community repo. Not sure what advantages Chimera would add.
在 HN 中查看
stock_toaster 2026/04/14 09:16
Chimera使用mimalloc代替musl的mallocng。

https://chimera-linux.org/docs/configuration/musl

Chimera uses mimalloc instead of musl’s mallocng.

https://chimera-linux.org/docs/configuration/musl

在 HN 中查看
lrvick 2026/04/14 10:51
然而，Alpine 和 Chimera 都不可复制或完整源代码引导或签名，并且不强制执行代码审查。老实说，除了低风险的爱好用例之外，我会避开这两种情况。

在我看来，它们最好被视为研究项目，可供为生产使用而设计的发行版参考。

Alpine and Chimera however both are not reproducible or full source bootstrapped or signed and do not enforce code review. I would honestly steer clear of both for anything but low risk hobby use cases.

IMO they should be best thought of as research projects useful for reference by distros designed for production use.

在 HN 中查看
czernobog 2026/04/14 10:33
非常酷和有趣..刚刚发现它是由以前的 Void Linux 维护者启动的，Void linux 也很棒！
Very cool and interesting.. Just found out it was started by a previous Void Linux maintainer, Void linux is great as well!

Crontab 2026/04/14 05:31
说到 OpenZFS 加密，有没有第三方对源代码进行审查？或者对其有效性进行任何测试？
Speaking of OpenZFS encryption, has there ever been any third party review of the source code? Or any testing of any kind of its effectiveness?
